## Meeting Purpose

[Align on progress and next steps for Lovable's SEO-optimized editorial content and template library projects.](https://fathom.video/share/BjDP69B5owokST8u-tq4bUTAro93QjVy?tab=summary&timestamp=192.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Engineering sync needed to resolve GitHub access and backend setup for template development](https://fathom.video/share/BjDP69B5owokST8u-tq4bUTAro93QjVy?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [Quality expectations for templates need alignment; balancing scale/SEO with design quality](https://fathom.video/share/BjDP69B5owokST8u-tq4bUTAro93QjVy?tab=summary&timestamp=809.0)
  - [Editorial content publishing targeted for next week; template library MVP with 5 samples by next week](https://fathom.video/share/BjDP69B5owokST8u-tq4bUTAro93QjVy?tab=summary&timestamp=1782.0)
  - [Design team (Nad) to take ownership of CMS scaffolding; GrowthX to focus on content creation](https://fathom.video/share/BjDP69B5owokST8u-tq4bUTAro93QjVy?tab=summary&timestamp=1696.0)

## Topics

### Project Overview and Goals

  - [Two main goals: publishing SEO-optimized editorial content and creating starter kit templates](https://fathom.video/share/BjDP69B5owokST8u-tq4bUTAro93QjVy?tab=summary&timestamp=192.0)
  - [Editorial content publishing targeted for next week](https://fathom.video/share/BjDP69B5owokST8u-tq4bUTAro93QjVy?tab=summary&timestamp=1782.0)
  - [Template project aims for V1 MVP and agreement on page design by next week](https://fathom.video/share/BjDP69B5owokST8u-tq4bUTAro93QjVy?tab=summary&timestamp=224.0)
  - [Sebastian working on design-forward templates separately](https://fathom.video/share/BjDP69B5owokST8u-tq4bUTAro93QjVy?tab=summary&timestamp=237.0)

### Template Library Strategy

  - [Aim to create indexable pages for long-tail SEO benefit, unlike competitors](https://fathom.video/share/BjDP69B5owokST8u-tq4bUTAro93QjVy?tab=summary&timestamp=669.0)
  - [Balancing logged-in vs. logged-out experiences](https://fathom.video/share/BjDP69B5owokST8u-tq4bUTAro93QjVy?tab=summary&timestamp=744.0)
  - [Creating thousands of templates across categories (e.g., hundreds for construction websites)](https://fathom.video/share/BjDP69B5owokST8u-tq4bUTAro93QjVy?tab=summary&timestamp=821.0)
  - [Challenge: meeting high-quality bar while maintaining scalability](https://fathom.video/share/BjDP69B5owokST8u-tq4bUTAro93QjVy?tab=summary&timestamp=821.0)

### Quality Expectations and Alignment

  - [Differing perspectives on quality bar between GrowthX and Sebastian (Lovable)](https://fathom.video/share/BjDP69B5owokST8u-tq4bUTAro93QjVy?tab=summary&timestamp=809.0)
  - [Need to define "good enough" quality for SEO-focused templates vs. homepage features](https://fathom.video/share/BjDP69B5owokST8u-tq4bUTAro93QjVy?tab=summary&timestamp=1038.0)
  - [Suggestion: Provide 10 representative examples for review and alignment](https://fathom.video/share/BjDP69B5owokST8u-tq4bUTAro93QjVy?tab=summary&timestamp=1438.0)
  - [Current quality target: Better than community-generated, unique, and 80% there for easy remixing](https://fathom.video/share/BjDP69B5owokST8u-tq4bUTAro93QjVy?tab=summary&timestamp=1300.0)

### Engineering Setup and Workflow

  - [GrowthX team received GitHub access but needs backend setup](https://fathom.video/share/BjDP69B5owokST8u-tq4bUTAro93QjVy?tab=summary&timestamp=536.0)
  - [Action: Schedule call between Lovable and GrowthX engineers to resolve setup issues](https://fathom.video/share/BjDP69B5owokST8u-tq4bUTAro93QjVy?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [Nad to identify key engineering stakeholders on Lovable side](https://fathom.video/share/BjDP69B5owokST8u-tq4bUTAro93QjVy?tab=summary&timestamp=575.0)

### Content Creation Process

  - [Exploring various methods: one-shot generation, programmatic iteration, GitHub integration](https://fathom.video/share/BjDP69B5owokST8u-tq4bUTAro93QjVy?tab=summary&timestamp=1551.0)
  - [Challenges with importing external designs (e.g., from Figma) into Lovable](https://fathom.video/share/BjDP69B5owokST8u-tq4bUTAro93QjVy?tab=summary&timestamp=1551.0)
  - [Testing different tech stacks and integration methods](https://fathom.video/share/BjDP69B5owokST8u-tq4bUTAro93QjVy?tab=summary&timestamp=1551.0)

### Blog/Guides Section

  - [Current blog design acknowledged as suboptimal; improvements planned](https://fathom.video/share/BjDP69B5owokST8u-tq4bUTAro93QjVy?tab=summary&timestamp=1635.0)
  - [Suggestion to create a separate /guides section initially, mirroring current blog structure](https://fathom.video/share/BjDP69B5owokST8u-tq4bUTAro93QjVy?tab=summary&timestamp=1658.0)
  - [Nad offered to take ownership of CMS scaffolding and templates](https://fathom.video/share/BjDP69B5owokST8u-tq4bUTAro93QjVy?tab=summary&timestamp=1696.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Schedule engineering sync call for GitHub and backend setup](https://fathom.video/share/BjDP69B5owokST8u-tq4bUTAro93QjVy?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [Align with Nad on MVP experience for template library](https://fathom.video/share/BjDP69B5owokST8u-tq4bUTAro93QjVy?tab=summary&timestamp=1722.0)
  - [GrowthX to provide 10 representative template examples for quality review](https://fathom.video/share/BjDP69B5owokST8u-tq4bUTAro93QjVy?tab=summary&timestamp=1438.0)
  - [Rachel to gather internal examples of high-quality Lovable-built apps](https://fathom.video/share/BjDP69B5owokST8u-tq4bUTAro93QjVy?tab=summary&timestamp=1488.0)
  - [Aida to send content suggestions for upcoming weeks via Slack](https://fathom.video/share/BjDP69B5owokST8u-tq4bUTAro93QjVy?tab=summary&timestamp=1741.0)
  - [Target next week for publishing editorial content and having 5 production-ready template samples](https://fathom.video/share/BjDP69B5owokST8u-tq4bUTAro93QjVy?tab=summary&timestamp=1782.0)
  - [Increase frequency of daily updates to address any blockers quickly](https://fathom.video/share/BjDP69B5owokST8u-tq4bUTAro93QjVy?tab=summary&timestamp=1838.0)
